system.description:
This hull learned to consume spirits and bolster its strength with theirs. It cannibalizes machinery and rummages in wrecked boats for parts. It has gondola prow shoulder guards and helm, and strange banded armor made of water-logged wood over intricate mechanical parts. It fears destruction.

It assassinates targets, with its body or by possessing machines near them. It hunts whispers, leeches, and scholars, stealing their knowledge and killing them. Their allies want revenge.
